input.config:
job: generate
config:
  name: "local_test_generation"
  process:
    - type: to_folder
      device: cuda:0
      model:
        name: "black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev"
        repo_id: "black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev"
        is_flux: true
        quantize: true
        lora_path: "/workspace/models/test_lora.safetensors"
      generate:
        prompts:
          - "A beautiful landscape with test_trigger in the foreground"
        height: 512
        width: 512
        steps: 20
        guidance_scale: 3.5
        seed: 42
        sample_count: 1
